双语转换.source_text: Today we discuss how working from home has changed daily life for many young people. It saves commuting time, but it also requires stronger self-discipline.
双语转换.reference_answer: 今天我们讨论居家办公如何改变了许多年轻人的日常生活。它节省了通勤时间，但也需要更强的自律。

双语转换.source_text: 上周末我和同学去做志愿活动。虽然很累，但我们帮助了很多老人，也学会了更好地与人沟通。
双语转换.reference_answer: Last weekend, my classmates and I took part in volunteer work. Although it was tiring, we helped many elderly people and learned to communicate better with others.

双语转换.source_text: Ladies and gentlemen, we are expecting a 12% year-on-year increase this quarter, provided that our logistics network in Southeast Asia remains stable.
双语转换.reference_answer: 各位女士们、先生们，如果我们在东南亚的物流网络保持稳定，本季度我们预计将实现同比12%的增长。

双语转换.source_text: 近年来，绿色能源投资持续增长。专家指出，技术创新和政策支持是推动行业发展的两大关键因素。
双语转换.reference_answer: In recent years, investment in green energy has continued to grow. Experts point out that technological innovation and policy support are the two key drivers of the industry's development.

双语转换.source_text: The challenge before us is not merely to recover from short-term shocks, but to redesign institutions that can withstand systemic uncertainty and geopolitical fragmentation.
双语转换.reference_answer: 摆在我们面前的挑战不仅是从短期冲击中恢复，更是要重塑能够承受系统性不确定性与地缘政治分化的制度。

双语转换.source_text: 所谓“双循环”新发展格局，绝不是封闭的国内循环，而是更加开放的国内国际双循环。中国超大规模市场优势将为各国提供更广阔的合作空间。
双语转换.reference_answer: The new development paradigm of dual circulation is by no means a closed domestic loop. Instead, it is a more open interaction between domestic and international circulations. China's vast market advantages will offer broader space for cooperation to all countries.

源语重述.source_text: 学校图书馆最近延长了开放时间，这让很多同学可以在晚上继续学习。
源语重述.reference_answer: 学校图书馆这段时间把开放时段拉长了，因此不少同学晚上也能留在那里复习。

源语重述.source_text: Many students make study plans in January, but only a few keep the same routine for more than two months.
源语重述.reference_answer: A lot of learners create study schedules at the start of the year, yet just a small number stick to them for over eight weeks.

源语重述.source_text: 由于近期降雨减少，多地水库蓄水量下降。有关部门已启动节水预案，并呼吁公众减少非必要用水。
源语重述.reference_answer: 最近雨量偏少，多个地区的水库储水明显减少。相关部门已经开始执行节水方案，同时倡议市民压缩非刚性用水。

源语重述.source_text: Artificial intelligence can improve medical access in remote areas, but its success depends on data quality, doctor training, and local policy support.
源语重述.reference_answer: AI may expand healthcare availability in rural regions, yet the outcome relies on reliable data, proper physician training, and supportive local regulations.

源语重述.source_text: 在全球供应链重构的背景下，企业需要在成本效率与风险韧性之间重新平衡，以应对高度不确定的外部环境。
源语重述.reference_answer: 面对全球供应链的再布局，企业必须重新拿捏成本效率和抗风险能力之间的关系，从而应对外部环境的高不确定性。

源语重述.source_text: Public policy should not only react to immediate crises but also cultivate long-term institutional trust, because social resilience is built gradually rather than overnight.
源语重述.reference_answer: Policy making must go beyond short-term emergency response and foster durable institutional trust, since societal resilience emerges over time, not in a single moment.
